description: Evidence checklist for all 63 Trust Services Criteria

evidence_items.control_name: Commitment to Integrity and Ethical Values
evidence_items.required_evidence: Code of conduct/ethics policy; Annual employee acknowledgment records; Disciplinary action procedures and records; Ethics hotline/whistleblower mechanism documentation; Board or committee oversight of ethics program
Board/committee charter; Board meeting minutes with security discussion; Board member independence disclosures; Security metrics actually presented to board (deck/report); Audit committee reports

evidence_items.control_name: Management Establishes Structure, Authority, and Responsibility
evidence_items.required_evidence: Organizational chart with security reporting lines; RACI matrix for security functions; CISO/security leadership job descriptions; Documented delegation of authority; Security team structure documentation

Job descriptions with security requirements; Background check policy and completion records; Security training program with 100% completion tracking; Performance evaluations referencing security; Professional development records; Onboarding training evidence

Performance reviews referencing security; Documented consequences for violations; Security KPIs assigned to individuals; Incident accountability documentation; Signed acknowledgment forms; Disciplinary action evidence

Information classification policy; Data inventory and data flow diagrams; Security information sources (threat intel, vulnerability databases); SIEM/security dashboard configurations; Log management and retention policy

Security awareness training materials and completion records; Internal security communications; Policy distribution with acknowledgment logs; Onboarding training completion records; Incident communication procedures and templates

External Trust Center or security page; Customer security notification procedures; Vendor/partner security communication; Regulatory notification procedures; Breach notification policy with timelines; NDA templates; SOC 2 report distribution process
Documented security objectives; Information security policy stating objectives; Risk appetite and tolerance statements; SLAs defining security commitments; Annual security strategy/roadmap
Formal risk assessment report (annual); Risk register with likelihood, impact, owners, treatment plans; Threat modeling documentation; Vulnerability assessment reports; Risk assessment methodology

Fraud risk assessment; Anti-fraud policy; Segregation of duties (SoD) matrix; Whistleblower mechanism; Management override controls and testing evidence; SoD enforcement evidence; SoD conflict reports

Change impact assessment procedures; New vendor/system/regulation risk evaluation process; M&A security assessment procedures; Regulatory change monitoring; Risk reassessment evidence triggered by changes

Continuous monitoring configurations (SIEM, GRC dashboards); Internal audit reports and schedules; Control self-assessment results; Penetration testing reports (annual); Automated compliance monitoring evidence; Quarterly control effectiveness reviews

Deficiency tracking log with timelines and owners; Management reporting on deficiencies; Audit finding remediation tracking; Escalation procedures for critical deficiencies; Corrective action completion evidence
Control-to-risk mapping; Control design documentation (preventive/detective mix); ITGC documentation; Application control documentation; Control selection rationale

Infrastructure security configurations; Network architecture diagrams; EDR deployment evidence (100% coverage); Database security configs; CSPM scan results with remediation; WAF configurations; Firewall rule reviews
Complete policy library with version control, review dates, and approval signatures; Annual review evidence; Employee acknowledgment records; Procedure documents; Policy exception register
SSO configuration evidence; MFA enforcement (all accounts); Firewall rules and network segmentation; WAF configurations; VPN configs for remote access; IdP Conditional Access policies
Provisioning workflow documentation; Access request and manager approval evidence; Background check confirmation before account creation; Onboarding checklist; Automated provisioning configs (SCIM)

RBAC matrix; Least privilege enforcement evidence; Role definitions mapped to job functions; Access modification tickets; PAM tool configurations; Privileged access register (quarterly review); Quarterly access review reports
Badge reader configurations; Visitor management logs; Data center access procedures/logs; Surveillance documentation; Clean desk policy; Cloud provider SOC 2 for data center physical security

Offboarding checklist with full access revocation; Timely removal evidence (within 24 hours for terminations); Access modification for role changes (movers); Automated deprovisioning; Quarterly access review removing stale accounts; Terminated user audit logs
EDR deployment (100% coverage); Anti-malware configs and signature currency; Email security gateway; Content filtering/DLP; MDM policies; Application whitelisting; Device compliance enforcement
TLS 1.2+ enforcement (TLS 1.3 preferred); AES-256 encryption at rest; Key management and rotation evidence (annual); VPN encryption; Email encryption; Certificate management; Legacy TLS disabled

Password policy (14+ chars, complexity, history, banned list); MFA across all critical systems; Secrets management (no hardcoded creds); Service account rotation (90-day max); Lockout config (5 attempts); Lockout alerting; Quarterly MFA audit

Data Loss Prevention (DLP) policy configurations; USB and removable media port restrictions; Approved data transfer channels documented; Prohibition of sensitive data via unapproved channels; Cloud storage public access blocks; Pre-commit scanning for secrets/sensitive data
SIEM config and alert rules; IDS/IPS evidence; FIM configurations; Cloud config monitoring (AWS Config, Azure Policy); Anomaly detection rules; SOC procedures; Weekly alert review evidence

Security monitoring dashboard; Centralized logging config; Alert notification and escalation (defined SLAs); Event correlation rules; 24/7 monitoring evidence (SOC or MSSP); Daily alert review; Weekly CISO summary; Uptime monitoring

evidence_items.control_name: Security Event Evaluation and Incident Response
evidence_items.required_evidence: Incident Response Plan; Severity matrix (Critical/High/Medium/Low); IR team roles and escalation paths; Playbooks for common scenarios; Incident ticket logs; Post-incident reviews for Critical/High; Tabletop exercises (annual); Notification procedures for individuals, regulators, customers
BCP; DRP; RTO/RPO definitions; Backup config and restore testing; Failover/redundancy documentation; DR test results (annual); Communication templates for incident notification

Scanning configs/schedules (infra weekly, endpoints monthly, code per-PR); Scan reports with remediation tracking; Patching SLAs (Critical 7d, High 30d, Medium 90d, Low 180d); SLA compliance metrics; Pen test report (annual); CVSS classification; Vulnerability register

Change management policy (Standard/Normal/Emergency classification); Change request and approval workflow; SoD evidence (no self-approval to production); Peer review records; Emergency change retrospective reviews; Test environment validation evidence; Version control and branch protection; IaC change logs
Risk treatment plans with owners and dates; BIA; BCP with testing evidence; DRP with testing evidence; Cyber liability insurance; Risk acceptance with executive sign-off for High/Critical risks

Vendor risk management policy; Vendor inventory with risk ratings; Vendor security assessments (SIG, CAIQ); Vendor SOC 2 report reviews (annual); Contract review for security clauses; Ongoing monitoring evidence; Subservice organization documentation; Vendor access reviews (quarterly)

Capacity monitoring dashboards with alerts (75% warning, 90% critical); Auto-scaling configs; Quarterly capacity forecast reports; Performance monitoring; Load testing results; Resource utilization reports

Backup policy and schedules; Backup success/failure reports monthly; Restore testing (quarterly recommended); Geographic redundancy/failover; Backup encryption; Cloud provider SOC 2 for environmental controls; Backup failure investigation evidence
DR test plans and results (annual); BCP tabletop exercises; Failover testing; Backup restore verification logs; Post-test remediation tracking; RTO/RPO validation; Executive sign-off on results

Status page or customer communication channel; SLA breach notification procedures and templates; Root cause analysis communication templates; Stakeholder notification timeline requirements; Evidence of customer communications for outages during audit period

evidence_items.control_name: Data Processing Completeness, Accuracy, and Timeliness
evidence_items.required_evidence: Input validation controls; Data reconciliation procedures/reports; Error handling and logging; Automated data quality checks; Transaction monitoring and exception reporting; Processing specifications documentation
Input validation rules; Data type/format enforcement; Duplicate detection; Authorization controls for input (RBAC); Error handling and rejection procedures; API input validation; OWASP input controls
Error monitoring and alerting; Error logs and resolution tracking; Data integrity checks; Reconciliation reports; Exception handling; Correction and reprocessing procedures
Output validation procedures; Report generation verification; Distribution controls (RBAC); Output logging and audit trail; Automated completeness checks; Authorization for report distribution
Database integrity checks (referential integrity, constraints); Checksum/hash verification; Corruption detection mechanisms; Storage versioning/object lock; Backup integrity verification

evidence_items.control_name: Identification and Classification of Confidential Information
evidence_items.required_evidence: Data classification policy; Data inventory with classification labels; Confidential data identification procedures; Handling guidelines by classification; Labeling/tagging procedures; DLP configurations; Periodic classification audit; Data flow diagrams

Retention and disposal policy; Cloud lifecycle policies; Secure destruction procedures (cryptographic erasure, NIST 800-88); Certificates of destruction; Device wipe records; Hardware disposal procedures; Disposal verification evidence
Public privacy policy (current); Cookie consent mechanism; Consent collection records; Notice update/distribution procedures; Opt-in/opt-out mechanisms; Records of processing activities (ROPA)
Consent preference center/portal; Marketing opt-out mechanisms; Do Not Sell/Share configs (CCPA); Preference tracking; Third-party sharing consent records; Cookie preference tool
Data minimization policy; Collection purpose documentation; Privacy impact assessments (PIAs); Collection limitation enforcement in code; API collection audit logs; Third-party SDK review
Consent withdrawal process documentation; Communication to users about consequences of non-consent; UI/UX showing opt-out implications; Records of consent withdrawal requests processed
Purpose limitation documentation; Use restriction enforcement evidence; Access controls limiting use to stated purpose; Audit of data usage against stated purposes
Data retention schedule with defined periods; Automated retention enforcement (lifecycle policies); Annual retention review documentation; Evidence of data deleted per schedule
Secure disposal procedures; Disposal verification records; Cryptographic erasure or NIST 800-88 evidence; Device wipe records; Certificate of destruction for physical media
DSAR procedures; DSAR tracking and response time records; Self-service access portal (if applicable); Identity verification procedures; Response time compliance (30d GDPR, 45d CCPA)
Data correction/deletion workflow; Correction request tracking; Evidence of corrections completed during audit period; Notification to third parties of corrections (where disclosed)
Data Processing Agreements (DPAs); Third-party data sharing agreements; Data sharing audit logs; Sub-processor list with advance notification; Cross-border transfer mechanisms (SCCs, BCRs)
Disclosure log documenting all authorized sharing events; Recipient identification; Purpose of disclosure; Date and scope of disclosed data; Retention of disclosure records per policy
Unauthorized disclosure/breach log; Incident records for privacy breaches; Root cause analysis; Remediation actions taken; Evidence of notification to affected individuals
Vendor privacy assessments; DPA clauses covering privacy obligations; Evidence of vendor privacy practice review; Vendor privacy certification review (SOC 2, ISO 27701)
Contractual requirement for vendor breach notification (72-hour clause); Vendor breach notification receipt log; Process for evaluating third-party breach impact; Escalation procedures
Breach notification policy with statutory timelines; Notification templates; Evidence of notifications sent (if breaches occurred); Regulatory notification records; Communication log

evidence_items.control_name: Communication of Privacy Practices Upon Request
evidence_items.required_evidence: Privacy inquiry response procedures; Records of privacy inquiries received and responses provided; Average response time tracking; Publicly available privacy documentation
Data quality procedures; Validation rules for personal information; Accuracy audit records; User profile update mechanisms; Deduplication processes; Quality monitoring reports

Privacy compliance monitoring procedures; Complaint handling process; Privacy incident response procedures; DPO appointment (if required); Privacy audit reports; Regulatory inquiry response procedures; Privacy training records
